creator: glennpj@gmail.com
text:
With this release of the nvidia driver, many GPUs have been relegated to
"legacy" status. There are now two legacy branches, the 1.0-96xx series
and the 1.0-71xx series. Take a look at Appendix A of the README for the
1.0.9746 driver: 

http://us.download.nvidia.com/freebsd/1.0-9746/README/appendix-a.html

This port update will no doubt break many people's Xorg setup but more importantly, prevent newcomers from getting a working graphical display.

Fix: 

Either add another "WITH_LEGACY..." knob or preferably split the nvidia-driver port into three separate ports.
